title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 435.375 - Representation by attorney
text:
435.375.  Representation by attorney. — A party has the right to be represented by an attorney at any proceeding or hearing under sections 435.350 to 435.470.  A waiver thereof prior to the proceeding or hearing is ineffective.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1203 § 6)
